title: Player HUD information hierarchy simplification
summary: Rework the default HUD hierarchy so the map, current objective, available actions, and selected-object inspector are readable without diagnostics/status-board overload.
acceptance: Default HUD no longer presents as a status-board wall: current state, next goal, first-play guidance, tasks and events are collapsed into a concise objective/action hierarchy
First screen preserves map as the dominant visual subject and exposes one obvious player action path before secondary details
Settings, language/system preference, diagnostics, fixture/source/hash/verdict language and long explanatory copy are hidden behind explicit secondary surfaces
Bottom action bar and selected-object inspector clearly answer what the player can do now, including disabled-command reasons where commands are unavailable
1280x720, 1366x768, 1600x900 and 1920x1080 layouts avoid overlap and keep the primary action path visible in zh-CN and en
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run --exclude=**/*.e2e.test.ts packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts

history.details: Simplified default player HUD hierarchy; moved settings and locale/system preferences behind secondary surfaces; kept command bar and inspector readable; fixed explicit diagnostics overlay not to cover player commands; required checks pass including web-shell e2e wrapper and quality.

verified: No blocking findings; HUD hierarchy is map/objective/action first, settings and diagnostics are behind explicit secondary surfaces, command bar and inspector preserve disabled reasons, en/zh-CN responsive coverage is recorded for required viewports, diagnostics overlay reachability is covered, scope stays UI/Web only, and later pawn/build authority work remains correctly deferred.
Rebased on main 1cbf80f; full integration gate passed: typecheck, HUD unit, web-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality.

review.summary: No blocking findings; HUD hierarchy is map/objective/action first, settings and diagnostics are behind explicit secondary surfaces, command bar and inspector preserve disabled reasons, en/zh-CN responsive coverage is recorded for required viewports, diagnostics overlay reachability is covered, scope stays UI/Web only, and later pawn/build authority work remains correctly deferred.

integration.summary: Rebased on main 1cbf80f; full integration gate passed: typecheck, HUD unit, web-shell e2e, validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality.
